+category
revision.text:
'''築山古墳'''（つきやまこふん）は[[古墳]]の名称である。同名の古墳が全国各地に存在する。
*[[築山古墳 (大和高田市)]] - [[奈良県]][[大和高田市]]築山 （国指定史跡・陵墓参考地） *[[築山古墳 (瀬戸内市)]] - [[岡山県]][[瀬戸内市]]長船町 *[[上塩冶築山古墳]]（かみえんやつきやまこふん） - [[島根県]][[出雲市]]上塩冶町 *[[玉造築山古墳]]（たまつくりつきやまこふん） - [[島根県]][[八束郡]][[玉湯町]]玉造 *[[築山古墳 (前原市)]] - [[福岡県]][[前原市]]三雲 *[[築山古墳 (大分市)]] - [[大分県]][[大分市]]本神崎 （国指定史跡）
{{aimai}} [[Category:日本の古墳|つきやまこふん]]

(Imperial Mausoleum Reference Site) * {{ill|Takaya Tsukiyama Kofun|ja|高屋築山古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Habikino City|ja|羽曳野市}}, Osaka Prefecture. (Designated as Emperor Ankan's Mausoleum by t..."
revision.text:
'''Tsukiyama Kofun''' (築山古墳) is the name of multiple [[kofun]] (ancient burial mounds) located across Japan.
* {{ill|Tsukiyama Kofun (Yamatotakada)|ja|築山古墳 (大和高田市)}} - Located in {{ill|Yamatotakada City|ja|大和高田市}}, Nara Prefecture. (Imperial Mausoleum Reference Site) * {{ill|Takaya Tsukiyama Kofun|ja|高屋築山古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Habikino City|ja|羽曳野市}}, Osaka Prefecture. (Designated as Emperor Ankan's Mausoleum by the Imperial Household Agency) * {{ill|Tsukiyama Kofun (Setouchi)|ja|築山古墳 (瀬戸内市)}} - Located in {{ill|Setouchi City|ja|瀬戸内市}}, Okayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Kami-Enya Tsukiyama Kofun|ja|上塩冶築山古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Izumo City|ja|出雲市}}, Shimane Prefecture. * {{ill|Tamatsukuri Tsukiyama Kofun|ja|玉造築山古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Matsue City|ja|松江市}}, Shimane Prefecture, in the {{ill|Tamayu Town|ja|玉湯町}} area. * {{ill|Tsukiyama Kofun (Itoshima)|ja|築山古墳 (糸島市)}} - Located in {{ill|Itoshima City|ja|糸島市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Tsukiyama Kofun (Oita)|ja|築山古墳 (大分市)}} (Kanzaki Tsukiyama Kofun) - Located in {{ill|Oita City|ja|大分市}}, Oita Prefecture. (National Historic Site)
{{ambiguous}} [[Category:Ancient burial mounds in Japan]] [[ja:築山古墳]]

* {{ill|Tsukiyama Kofun (Yamatotakada)|ja|築山古墳 (大和高田市)}} - Located in {{ill|Yamatotakada City|ja|大和高田市}}, Nara Prefecture. (Imperial Mausoleum Reference Site) * {{ill|Takaya Tsukiyama Kofun|ja|高屋築山古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Habikino City|ja|羽曳野市}}, Osaka Prefecture. (Designated as Emperor Ankan's Mausoleum by the Imperial Household Agency) * {{ill|Tsukiyama Kofun (Setouchi)|ja|築山古墳 (瀬戸内市)|1=Tsukiyama Kofun (Setouchi city)}} - Located in {{ill|Setouchi City|ja|瀬戸内市}}, Okayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Kami-Enya Tsukiyama Kofun|ja|上塩冶築山古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Izumo City|ja|出雲市}}, Shimane Prefecture. * {{ill|Tamatsukuri Tsukiyama Kofun|ja|玉造築山古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Matsue City|ja|松江市}}, Shimane Prefecture, in the {{ill|Tamayu Town|ja|玉湯町}} area. * {{ill|Tsukiyama Kofun (Itoshima)|ja|築山古墳 (糸島市)}} - Located in {{ill|Itoshima City|ja|糸島市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Tsukiyama Kofun (Oita)|ja|築山古墳 (大分市)}} (Kanzaki Tsukiyama Kofun) - Located in {{ill|Oita City|ja|大分市}}, Oita Prefecture. (National Historic Site)

revision.text:
'''Tsukiyama Kofun''' (築山古墳) is the name of multiple [[kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) located across Japan.
* {{ill|Tsukiyama Kofun (Yamatotakada)|ja|築山古墳 (大和高田市)}} - Located in {{ill|Yamatotakada City|ja|大和高田市}}, Nara Prefecture. (Imperial {{ill|Mausoleum Reference Site|ja|陵墓参考地|1=Mausoleum Reference Site}}) * {{ill|Takaya Tsukiyama Kofun|ja|高屋築山古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Habikino City|ja|羽曳野市}}, Osaka Prefecture. (Designated as Emperor Ankan's Mausoleum by the Imperial Household Agency) * {{ill|Tsukiyama Kofun (Setouchi)|ja|築山古墳 (瀬戸内市)|1=Tsukiyama Kofun (Setouchi city)}} - Located in {{ill|Setouchi City|ja|瀬戸内市}}, Okayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Kami-Enya Tsukiyama Kofun|ja|上塩冶築山古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Izumo City|ja|出雲市}}, Shimane Prefecture. * {{ill|Tamatsukuri Tsukiyama Kofun|ja|玉造築山古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Matsue City|ja|松江市}}, Shimane Prefecture, in the {{ill|Tamayu Town|ja|玉湯町}} area. * {{ill|Tsukiyama Kofun (Itoshima)|ja|築山古墳 (糸島市)}} - Located in {{ill|Itoshima City|ja|糸島市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Tsukiyama Kofun (Oita)|ja|築山古墳 (大分市)}} (Kanzaki Tsukiyama Kofun) - Located in {{ill|Oita City|ja|大分市}}, Oita Prefecture. (National Historic Site)
{{ambiguous}}

revision.text:
'''築山古墳'''（つきやまこふん）は[[古墳]]の名称である。同名の古墳が日本各地に存在する。
* [[築山古墳 (大和高田市)]] - [[奈良県]][[大和高田市]]築山 （陵墓参考地） * [[高屋築山古墳]] - [[大阪府]][[羽曳野市]]古市（宮内庁指定 安閑天皇陵） * [[築山古墳 (瀬戸内市)]] - [[岡山県]][[瀬戸内市]]長船町 * [[上塩冶築山古墳]]（かみえんやつきやまこふん） - [[島根県]][[出雲市]]上塩冶町 * [[玉造築山古墳]]（たまつくりつきやまこふん） - [[島根県]][[松江市]][[玉湯町]]玉造 * [[築山古墳 (糸島市)]] - [[福岡県]][[糸島市]]三雲 * [[築山古墳 (大分市)]]（神崎築山古墳） - [[大分県]][[大分市]]本神崎 （国の史跡）
{{aimai}} {{デフォルトソート:つきやまこふん}} [[Category:日本の古墳]]

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[築山古墳]] to [[Tsukiyama Kofun (disambiguation)]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import

* {{ill|Tsukiyama Kofun (Yamatotakada)|ja|築山古墳 (大和高田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukiyama Kofun (Yamatotakada)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Yamatotakada, Nara|Yamatotakada City]], Nara Prefecture. (Imperial {{ill|Candidate Imperial Mausoleum|ja|陵墓参考地|1=Candidate Imperial Mausoleum|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Candidate Imperial Mausoleum|13=User:Immanuelle/Candidate Imperial Mausoleum|qq=}}) * {{ill|Takaya Tsukiyama Kofun|ja|高屋築山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takaya Tsukiyama Kofun|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Habikino|Habikino City]], Osaka Prefecture. (Designated as Emperor Ankan's Mausoleum by the Imperial Household Agency) * {{ill|Tsukiyama Kofun (Setouchi)|ja|築山古墳 (瀬戸内市)|1=Tsukiyama Kofun (Setouchi city)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukiyama Kofun (Setouchi)|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukiyama Kofun (Setouchi city)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Setouchi, Okayama|Setouchi City]], Okayama Prefecture. * [[:en:Kamienyatsukiyama Kofun|Kami-Enya Tsukiyama Kofun]] - Located in [[:en:Izumo, Shimane|Izumo City]], Shimane Prefecture. * {{ill|Tamatsukuri Shrine|lt=Tamatsukuri Shrine|lt=Tamatsukuri Tsukiyama Kofun|ja|玉造築山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tamatsukuri Tsukiyama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 玉作湯神社}} - Located in [[:en:Matsue|Matsue City]], Shimane Prefecture, in the [[:en:Tamayu, Shimane|Tamayu Town]] area. * {{ill|Tsukiyama Kofun (Itoshima)|ja|築山古墳 (糸島市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukiyama Kofun (Itoshima)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Itoshima, Fukuoka|Itoshima City]], Fukuoka Prefecture. * [[:en:Tsukiyama Kofun|Tsukiyama Kofun (Oita)]] (Kanzaki Tsukiyama Kofun) - Located in [[:en:Ōita (city)|Oita City]], Oita Prefecture. (National Historic Site)
{{ambiguous}}
